diagnosis.final_diagnosis: schizoaffective disorder, bipolar type, current episode manic without psychotic features
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with agitation, aggression, and mood instability, and was assessed in the context of her known history of bipolar disorder with psychotic features. During evaluation, she exhibited significant agitation and disorganized behavior, which were noted as an acute decline from her baseline status. The discharge diagnosis reflected the observed manic symptoms without psychotic features at the time of her evaluation.
